name: City Park
description: Come play pickleball at City Park in Park City, UT! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Oakley City Pickleball Complex
description: Oakley City Pickleball Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oakley, UT. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Snow FLower Condominium Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Snow FLower Condominium Complex in Park City, UT! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Solamere Oaks Swim and Tennis Club
description: Solamere Oaks Swim and Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Park City, UT. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: The Basin Recreation Fieldhouse
description: Come play pickleball at The Basin Recreation Fieldhouse in Park City, UT! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: The Park City Municipal Athletic & Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at The Park City Municipal Athletic & Recreation Center in Park City, UT! There are 8 hard and wood courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Trailside Park
description: Trailside Park is a place to play pickleball in Park City, UT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Willow Creek Park
description: Willow Creek Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Park City, UT. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The court lines are permanent. The courts are free.
